data.title: 国际服歌曲「Sparkle Express」MV公布

data.body:
['Sparkle Express' Music Video Released!]

Sensei, the special Highlander OST, "Sparkle Express," is now available! Be sure to give it a listen!

![5fcfc08866cd56539290616e9dd30274.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16130/VcxF9fCCQ8WkiWugKgv9XvuO20iQeOtJ.jpg)
